title: thelymitra angustifolia
intro: Thelymitra angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra angustifolia are believed to include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
